channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Health officials track dozens who left hantavirus-stricken ship after 1st fatality - AP News
item.description:
1. Health officials track dozens who left hantavirus-stricken ship after 1st fatality  AP News
  2. From US to Singapore, cruise passengers are being monitored for hantavirus  CNN
  3. Why the hantavirus outbreak is different from the COVID-19 pandemic  Axios
  4. U.S. Health Authorities Monitor Hantavirus Cruise Passengers in Georgia, California and Arizona  The New York Times
  5. What is the Andes virus? The hantavirus linked to a cruise ship outbreak is among the deadliest strains  NBC News

item.title: Your heart rate is more uneven than you think. This is what it says about your health - BBC
item.description: Your heart rate is more uneven than you think. This is what it says about your health  BBC

item.title: Beaver that bit ‘several people’ in New Jersey tests positive for rabies - Global News
item.description:
1. Beaver that bit ‘several people’ in New Jersey tests positive for rabies  Global News
  2. Rabid beaver attacks boy fishing at New Jersey lake, prompting health officials to warn residents  Fox News
  3. Angry Beaver Attacks 8 Year Old Boy At Mahwah Park  News12 | New Jersey
  4. Beaver tests positive for rabies after biting 8-year-old. See attack  Yahoo
  5. ‘It’s not every day you see someone toss a beaver.’ This one bit multiple people — and had rabies.  NJ.com

item.title: FDA vaccine studies censored by Trump admin after finding benefits of shots - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. FDA vaccine studies censored by Trump admin after finding benefits of shots  Ars Technica
  2. F.D.A. Blocked Publication of Research Finding Covid and Shingles Vaccines Were Safe  The New York Times

  5. Unforced errors flummox HHS’ radical transparency bid—again  BioSpace

item.title: East Valley measles outbreak grows: Where you may have been exposed - Phoenix New Times

item.title: Tick bite ER visits surge across Northeast, CDC data show - Times Union
item.description:

item.title: Passenger with hantavirus was briefly on board a KLM aircraft in Johannesburg - KLM Royal Dutch Airlines
item.description:

  4. Flight attendant hospitalized after coming in contact with hantavirus cruise ship passenger who died  New York Post

item.title: Babies are bleeding to death as parents reject vitamin shot given at birth - Salon.com
item.description:

item.title: Scientists Reveal How Exercise Benefits Every Part of Your Body - ScienceAlert

item.title: Eggs and brain health: New study cracks open Alzheimer’s link - WZTV
item.description:
1. Eggs and brain health: New study cracks open Alzheimer’s link  WZTV
  2. A dozen things you need to know about your eggs  The Times

  4. Study: Egg consumption is associated with a lower risk of Alzheimer’s Disease  Loma Linda University
  5. The fridge staple that could lower your risk of Alzheimer’s  The i Paper

item.title: While patients lay unconscious under anesthesia, their brains kept decoding stories and preparing for what came next - Medical Xpress
item.description:
1. While patients lay unconscious under anesthesia, their brains kept decoding stories and preparing for what came next  Medical Xpress
  2. Plasticity and language in the anaesthetized human hippocampus  Nature
  3. The brain may still be able to hear speech under anesthesia  Scientific American
  4. Brains have a mind of their own under general anaesthetic  The Times
  5. New Study Suggests The Brain Can Continue Learning While In An Unconscious State  U.S. News & World Report

item.title: Moderna’s mRNA flu vaccine more effective than standard shot in late-stage trial - NBC News
item.description:

  4. Trivalent mRNA Flu Shot More Effective Than Standard Vaccines  MedPage Today
  5. Moderna Announces New England Journal of Medicine Publication of Pivotal Phase 3 Clinical Safety and Efficacy Data for Its Investigational Seasonal Influenza Vaccine, mRNA-1010  Rutland Herald

item.title: Drinking Coffee May Have a Surprising Benefit, New Study Says - EatingWell
item.description:

  4. Coffee's mood-boosting effects aren't just down to caffeine  New Scientist

item.title: Why sitting all day is so bad for you — and what to do about it - The Washington Post
item.description:

  4. Wellness Wednesday: Health risks of sitting too much, how to fix it  WLNS 6 News
